headline: Canada to Provide Funding, Buy Equity Stakes in AI Startups
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Canada will provide funding to help artificial intelligence companies scale up, and plans to take equity stakes in the country’s most promising AI firms to accelerate the creation of so-called “national champions.”Most Read from BloombergGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake SaleRepublican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking TrumpTrump Begins Rebuilding His Tariff Wall, Citing Forced LaborBroadcom Slides by Most in More Than a Year on AI Outlook MissTrump to G

headline: Why The Narrative Around Walt Disney (DIS) Is Shifting On Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Walt Disney sits at about US$129.49, compared with the prior US$128.25, reflecting a modest adjustment to where analysts think the stock could reasonably trade. This fine tuning lines up with recent Street research, where banks have been nudging price targets higher or lower by US$1 to US$25 as they reassess Disney’s execution across its key businesses. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving Disney narrative and what that...
